scripts.dev: concurrently --names "API,FRONT,BO" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta,yellow" "npm run dev --prefix api" "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm run dev --prefix backoffice"
scripts.build: concurrently "npm run build --prefix api" "npm run build --prefix frontend" "npm run build --prefix backoffice"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix api && npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix backoffice
